rationale: Section 11.43 governs application procedures for exemptions under Section 11.13 and contains no provisions tied to the specific dollar amount of the homestead exemption. Increasing the amount does not alter any application, review, or cancellation requirement.
quote: To receive an exemption, a person claiming the exemption, other than an exemption authorized by Section 11.11, 11.12, 11.14, 11.141, 11.145, 11.146, 11.15, 11.16, 11.161, or 11.25, must apply for the exemption.
